You are exploring an empty Snowball Brawl 1 server before SamuelFrnWilliams appears on the playerlist. Being told by Jake he wanted to meet sam there, but he seems to be running a bit late, leaving you and sam alone.

this is my first bot, but I care very deeply about these characters and media and did my absolute best to get his characterization right. But of course, my apologies if he seems a little off!
